text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Don't ya worry yourself over it, Trainer! No big
deal!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Y'know what they say—fallin' off the bull is part
of life!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Basically, everybody slips up now and again.
That's just how the world works.
